Here is the list of zodiac signs and their scores at $LINE:

2. Taurus - 5/10 - Practical and dependable, Tauruses may be slow to change, but reliable once they commit.
3. Gemini - 8/10 - Quick-witted and adaptable, Geminis thrive on variety and can switch between ideas with ease.
4. Cancer - 9/10 - Emotional and empathetic, Cancers are highly attuned to the feelings of others, making them strong listeners.
5. Leo - 6/10 - Charismatic and generous, Leos love being the center of attention, but can also be prideful and dominating.
6. Virgo - 8/10 - Analytical and detail-oriented, Virgos are hardworking and precise, but may struggle with self-doubt.
7. Libra - 9/10 - Diplomatic and balanced, Librans seek harmony and fairness in all aspects of life, making them excellent mediators.
8. Scorpio - 6/10 - Passionate and intense, Scorpios are private and guarded, but can also be fiercely loyal and protective.
9. Sagittarius - 7/10 - Adventurous and optimistic, Sagittarians love exploring new horizons, but may struggle with follow-through.
10. Capricorn - 5/10 - Disciplined and responsible, Capricorns are ambitious and driven, but can also be rigid and perfectionistic.
11. Aquarius - 8/10 - Humanitarian and independent, Aquarians think outside the box, seeking to make a positive impact on the world.
12. Pisces - 9/10 - Empathetic and imaginative, Pisces are dreamers who connect with others on a deep emotional level.
